name: Banana Bread #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Beat shortening in a mixer until creamy.
4. Add sugar and eggs, continuing to beat at medium speed for one minute.
5. Add bananas to the egg mixture and mix until blended.
6. Add the flour mixture, beating at low speed only until blended.
7. Turn the batter into a buttered loaf pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean.
Notes:
- Substitute cream cheese for shortening.
- For a spicy version, add 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon mace, and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg to the flour mixture.
